content.question: To what extent do current school funding rules (post-2020) continue to incentivize segregation of pupils into special classes or schools through per-pupil allocations tied to SEN status, and what is the counterfactual funding structure under integrated inclusion-based allocation?
content.reduction_path: Request a transparent audit of current (2024–2025) school funding formulae from the Hungarian Ministry of Education; compare per-pupil funding for integrated vs. segregated provision across school types; model alternative inclusive funding models (e.g., funding pupil-needs rather than classification status) and estimate fiscal and enrollment implications.
